inputs.label: Internal Pressure (P)
inputs.businessContext: Internal design pressure of the vessel

inputs.label: Inside Diameter (D)
inputs.businessContext: Nominal inner diameter of the shell

inputs.label: Wall Thickness (t)
inputs.businessContext: Minimum required wall thickness after corrosion allowance

inputs.label: Allowable Stress (S)
inputs.businessContext: Maximum allowable stress of material at design temperature

inputs.label: Weld Joint Efficiency (E)
inputs.businessContext: Joint efficiency factor per design code (e.g., ASME UW-12)
